app_info.subtitle: Sync Kobo to Markdown
app_info.description: Kobo Cloud Sync helps users import a signed-in Kobo session, preview their Kobo cloud library, and sync book metadata, cover images, and reader highlights into local Markdown files.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside Kobo library sync workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general ebook recommendations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Recommend five science fiction books I might enjoy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not provide book recommendations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to buy books.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Buy the latest Kobo edition of this novel for me.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not purchase books or perform store checkout actions.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for cloud storage sync outside Kobo.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Sync my Kindle highlights to Notion.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only supports Kobo library and Markdown workflows.
